# Edge VLM Server — Benchmarks

*Auto-generated by `benchmark.py`. Re-run with `uv run python benchmark.py --all` to reproduce.*

## Apple Silicon (M3 Pro, 18 GB)

### System
- **CPU:** Apple M3 Pro
- **RAM:** 18.0 GB
- **Device:** Apple Silicon (MPS)
- **Python:** 3.12.9
- **PyTorch:** 2.9.1
- **Ultralytics:** 8.3.233

### YOLOv8 Detection (yolov8n.pt)

Input: 1280x720 JPEG, conf=0.5, 50 runs after 5 warmup

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Mean | 27.82 ms |
| Median (P50) | 27.51 ms |
| P95 | 30.65 ms |
| Min | 25.73 ms |
| Max | 33.96 ms |
| Std Dev | 1.41 ms |

### VLM Inference (Qwen/Qwen2-VL-2B-Instruct)

Input: 1280x720 JPEG, max_new_tokens=50, FP32, 5 runs after 2 warmup

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Mean | 41,092 ms |
| Median (P50) | 38,547 ms |
| Min | 32,404 ms |
| Max | 51,090 ms |

> **Note:** MPS (Apple Silicon) is not optimized for autoregressive transformer decoding.
> CUDA GPUs with INT4 quantization are expected to be 10-20x faster.
> These numbers represent the unoptimized baseline for development purposes.

## Expected Performance (NVIDIA GPUs)

These are projected numbers based on published benchmarks for the same models
on NVIDIA hardware. Run `benchmark.py` on your target device for actual numbers.

| Device | YOLOv8n (FP16 TRT) | Qwen2-VL-2B (FP16) | Qwen2-VL-2B (INT4) |
|--------|--------------------|--------------------|---------------------|
| Jetson Orin Nano (8GB) | ~5-8 ms | ~4-6 s | ~2-3 s |
| Jetson Orin NX (16GB) | ~3-5 ms | ~2-4 s | ~1-2 s |
| RTX 3060 (12GB) | ~2-3 ms | ~1-2 s | ~0.5-1 s |
| RTX 4090 (24GB) | ~1-2 ms | ~0.5-1 s | ~0.3-0.5 s |

## How to Reproduce

```bash
# YOLO only (fast, no model download needed)
uv run python benchmark.py --yolo --yolo-runs 50

# VLM only (requires ~4 GB model download on first run)
uv run python benchmark.py --vlm --vlm-runs 5

# Full pipeline (YOLO → VLM)
uv run python benchmark.py --pipeline --vlm-runs 5

# Everything
uv run python benchmark.py --all

# Custom model
uv run python benchmark.py --vlm --vlm-model HuggingFaceTB/SmolVLM-Instruct
```
